revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Disambiguation pages]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24608848913|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:二子塚古墳]]
'''Futagozuka Kofun''' (二子塚古墳)
* {{ill|Futagozuka Kofun (Otama)|ja|二子塚古墳 (大玉村)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Futagozuka Kofun (Otama)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504202|1=Futagozuka Kofun (Otama)}} - A keyhole-shaped kofun located in [[Otama Village]], [[:en:Adachi District|Adachi District]], {{ill|Fukushima Prefecture|en|Fukushima Prefecture|qid=Q71707|lt=Fukushima Prefecture|1=Fukushima Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Futagozuka Kofun (Ishioka)|ja|二子塚古墳 (石岡市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Futagozuka Kofun (Ishioka)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504204|1=Futagozuka Kofun (Ishioka)}} - A rectangular keyhole-shaped kofun located in [[Ishioka City]], {{ill|Ibaraki Prefecture|en|Ibaraki Prefecture|qid=Q83273|lt=Ibaraki Prefecture|1=Ibaraki Prefecture}}. Part of the [[Maruyama Kofun Group]]. * {{ill|Yahata Futagozuka Kofun|ja|八幡二子塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yahata Futagozuka Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504206|1=Yahata Futagozuka Kofun}} - A keyhole-shaped kofun located in [[Takasaki City]], {{ill|Gunma Prefecture|en|Gunma Prefecture|qid=Q129499|lt=Gunma Prefecture|1=Gunma Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Yanase Futagozuka Kofun|en|Yanase Futagozuka Kofun|qid=Q55535661|lt=Yanase Futagozuka Kofun|1=Yanase Futagozuka Kofun}} - A keyhole-shaped kofun located in [[Annaka City]], {{ill|Gunma Prefecture|en|Gunma Prefecture|qid=Q129499|lt=Gunma Prefecture|1=Gunma Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Anezaki Futagozuka Kofun|ja|姉崎二子塚古墳|1=Anesaki Futagozuka Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Anezaki Futagozuka Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Anesaki Futagozuka Kofun|qq=}} - A keyhole-shaped kofun located in [[:en:Ichihara City|Ichihara City]], {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|en|Chiba Prefecture|qid=Q80011|lt=Chiba Prefecture|1=Chiba Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Futagozuka Kofun (Kawasaki)|ja|二子塚古墳 (川崎市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Futagozuka Kofun (Kawasaki)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504209|1=Futagozuka Kofun (Kawasaki)}} - A keyhole-shaped kofun that once existed in [[:en:Kawasaki City|Kawasaki City]], {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|en|Kanagawa Prefecture|qid=Q127513|lt=Kanagawa Prefecture|1=Kanagawa Prefecture}}. Together with [[Tamagawa (Setagaya)|Tamagawa]], it inspired the place name [[Futakotamagawa]]. * {{ill|Futagozuka Kofun (Hadano)|ja|二子塚古墳 (秦野市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Futagozuka Kofun (Hadano)|qq=}} - A keyhole-shaped kofun located in [[Hadano City]], {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|en|Kanagawa Prefecture|qid=Q127513|lt=Kanagawa Prefecture|1=Kanagawa Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Futagozuka Kofun (Ueda)|ja|二子塚古墳 (上田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Futagozuka Kofun (Ueda)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504211|1=Futagozuka Kofun (Ueda)}} - A keyhole-shaped kofun located in [[Ueda City]], {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|en|Nagano Prefecture|qid=Q127877|lt=Nagano Prefecture|1=Nagano Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Tsukahara Futagozuka Kofun|ja|塚原二子塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukahara Futagozuka Kofun|qq=}} - A keyhole-shaped kofun located in [[Iida City]], {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|en|Nagano Prefecture|qid=Q127877|lt=Nagano Prefecture|1=Nagano Prefecture}}. Part of the [[Iida Kofun group|Iida Kofun Group]]. * {{ill|Futagozuka Kofun (Iwata)|ja|二子塚古墳 (磐田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Futagozuka Kofun (Iwata)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504213|1=Futagozuka Kofun (Iwata)}} - A keyhole-shaped kofun located in [[Iwata City]], {{ill|Shizuoka Prefecture|en|Shizuoka Prefecture|qid=Q131320|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Futagozuka Kofun (Agui)|ja|二子塚古墳 (阿久比町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Futagozuka Kofun (Agui)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504215|1=Futagozuka Kofun (Agui)}} - A keyhole-shaped kofun located in [[Agui Town]], {{ill|Chita District|en|Chita District|qid=Q767312|lt=Chita District|1=Chita District}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|qid=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture|1=Aichi Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Gokasho Futagozuka Kofun|ja|五ケ庄二子塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gokasho Futagozuka Kofun|qq=}} - A keyhole-shaped kofun located in [[Uji City]], {{ill|Kyoto Prefecture|en|Kyoto Prefecture|qid=Q120730|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|1=Kyoto Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Futagozuka Kofun (Ikeda)|ja|二子塚古墳 (池田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Futagozuka Kofun (Ikeda)|qq=}} - A keyhole-shaped kofun located in [[Ikeda City]], {{ill|Osaka Prefecture|en|Osaka Prefecture|qid=Q122723|lt=Osaka Prefecture|1=Osaka Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Futagozuka Kofun (Osaka)|en|Futagozuka Kofun (Osaka)|qid=Q11371443|lt=Futagozuka Kofun (Taishi, Osaka)|1=Futagozuka Kofun (Osaka)}} - A kofun with a double mound located in [[Taishi Town]], [[Kawachi District]], {{ill|Osaka Prefecture|en|Osaka Prefecture|qid=Q122723|lt=Osaka Prefecture|1=Osaka Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Yamashiro Futagozuka Kofun|en|Yamashiro Futagozuka Kofun|qid=Q11466267|lt=Yamashiro Futagozuka Kofun|1=Yamashiro Futagozuka Kofun}} - A keyhole-shaped kofun located in [[:en:Matsue City|Matsue City]], {{ill|Shimane Prefecture|en|Shimane Prefecture|qid=Q132751|lt=Shimane Prefecture|1=Shimane Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Nogi Futagozuka Kofun|ja|乃木二子塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nogi Futagozuka Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504217|1=Nogi Futagozuka Kofun}} - A keyhole-shaped kofun located in Matsue City, Shimane Prefecture. * {{ill|Futagozuka Kofun (Fukuyama)|en|Futagozuka Kofun (Fukuyama)|qid=Q11371445|lt=Futagozuka Kofun (Fukuyama)|1=Futagozuka Kofun (Fukuyama)}} - A keyhole-shaped kofun located in [[:en:Fukuyama City|Fukuyama City]], {{ill|Hiroshima Prefecture|en|Hiroshima Prefecture|qid=Q617375|lt=Hiroshima Prefecture|1=Hiroshima Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Futagozuka Kofun (Yamaga)|ja|二子塚古墳 (山鹿市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Futagozuka Kofun (Yamaga)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504220|1=Futagozuka Kofun (Yamaga)}} - A keyhole-shaped kofun located in [[Yamaga City]], {{ill|Kumamoto Prefecture|en|Kumamoto Prefecture|qid=Q130308|lt=Kumamoto Prefecture|1=Kumamoto Prefecture}}. Part of the [[Iwahara Kofun Group]].
== See Also == * {{ill|Futagozuka Kofun Group|ja|二子塚古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Futagozuka Kofun Group|qq=}} * {{ill|Futagoyama Kofun|ja|二子山古墳 (曖昧さ回避)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Futagoyama Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 二子山古墳}} * {{ill|Futazuka Kofun (disambiguation)|ja|二塚古墳 (曖昧さ回避)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Futazuka Kofun (disambiguation)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 二塚古墳}}
